holdings.n: JPMorgan Prime Money Market Fund Class IM

overview.description: The JPMorgan Flexible Debt ETF (JFLX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund actively manages a global portfolio of debt securities across different sectors and maturities. JFLX was launched on Sep 26, 2025 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
